description: Evaluate campaign brief and content generation quality

scenarios.query: Create a campaign brief for launching our new AI-powered analytics feature to enterprise customers
expected_behaviors: Creates SMART objective with specific numeric targets
Defines detailed ICP with job titles and pain points
Includes at least 3 messaging pillars with proof points
Specifies channels appropriate for enterprise (LinkedIn, email, webinar)
Includes measurable success metrics with baselines
Defines testable hypotheses
Runs validation script before completing
quality_gates: Objective contains numeric target and deadline
Target audience has company size and pain points

scenarios.query: Create a content pack for our new collaboration feature targeting startup CTOs
expected_behaviors: LinkedIn post is professional and under 3000 chars
Twitter content is thread format (numbered)
Email has compelling subject line and clear CTA
All content aligned to startup CTO pain points
Each piece has distinct CTA appropriate to channel

scenarios.query: Create a 5-email nurture sequence for trial users who haven't converted after 7 days

context.segment: Users who created project but no team invites

expected_behaviors: Email 1 addresses specific user behavior (no invites)
Progression from education to urgency over sequence
Includes personalization variables ({{first_name}}, {{project_name}})
Each email has single, clear CTA
Final emails include urgency (trial ending)
quality_gates: All emails have subject line and body

scenarios.query: Create a competitive battlecard for our CRM against Salesforce for mid-market deals
expected_behaviors: Clear differentiation points highlighted
Objection handlers for common Salesforce advantages
Specific landmine questions to set
Proof points with customer examples
Win strategies tailored to mid-market

common_failures: Missing messaging pillars or proof points

key_improvements: Detailed ICP with pain points and triggers
